anchors_consulted: lean-tensor-categories Mathlib upstream cycle (Phase 5o Wave 4 + Wave 5)

round2_blocker_status.I2-FIGREV2-BLOCK-1: RESOLVED — i2_fig5 re-authored with short in-node labels (R1/R2/R3, PR-1..PR-4+, F1/F2) and side-table legend mapping abbreviations to full descriptions; all labels now legible. Note: a plotly.js render bug was discovered during round-3 verification — the title text contained the HTML entity `→` which kaleido/plotly.js rejects with Error 525. Substituted Unicode arrow `→` and the PNG re-rendered cleanly. The previously-saved PNG (timestamped 09:36 in the figures dir) was the OLD long-label version because the kaleido write_image call had silently failed during the figure-author session; round-3 inspection caught and fixed both the source and the rendered artifact.

round2_advisory_status.I2-FIGREV2-ADV-1: RESOLVED — i2_fig4 caption (paper line 269 area) revised to defer per-theorem test names to §2 (sec:jackknife) prose; figure no longer needs per-node test badges.
round2_advisory_status.I2-FIGREV2-ADV-2: DEFERRED (cosmetic) — i2_fig3 still has lower-canvas blank space; not load-bearing for JOSS submission, may be cropped pre-press.
round2_advisory_status.I2-FIGREV2-ADV-3: DEFERRED (cosmetic) — i2_fig3 column header 'Verlinde verified' vs caption 'Verlinde-formula' copy-edit; one-token edit pre-press.
round2_advisory_status.I2-FIGREV2-ADV-4: DEFERRED (cosmetic) — i2_fig2 Sankey label legibility at two-column layouts; depends on final journal layout choice.
round2_advisory_status.I2-FIGREV2-ADV-5: DEFERRED (optional) — i2_fig1 omits SphericalCategory as a separate node; §3 prose treats it as part of the Pivotal/Ribbon chain; not load-bearing.

Caption now reads (paper around line 269): '...Each project theorem has a corresponding test in tests/test_verified_statistics.py that exercises its numerical instantiation; the test names are listed in the prose (Section sec:jackknife) rather than overlaid on each node to keep the dependency graph readable.' figures.name: i2_fig5_mathlib_upstream_flow.png

rendering.notes: Re-authored. Visible elements: (i) bold title 'Mathlib upstream coordination: R1/R2/R3 gates → atomic-PR chain'; (ii) subtitle 'Steel-blue gates → amber PR sequence; cool-grey fallback for software-only release (paper I2 §7).'; (iii) top-right kind legend (R-gate / atomic Mathlib PR / software-only fallback); (iv) seven horizontal nodes on the upper rail — three steel-blue R-gate rectangles (R1, R2, R3) followed by four amber PR rectangles (PR-1, PR-2, PR-3, PR-4+), connected by colored arrows; (v) two cool-grey fallback rectangles (F1, F2) on a lower rail, with R3→F1 vertical fallback arrow and F1→F2 horizontal arrow; (vi) bottom side-table legend in two columns mapping each abbreviation to its full description (R1=Mathlib Zulip introduction, R2=AI-tool-assistance disclosure, R3=PR-strategy discussion, PR-1=QSqrt2+ComputableAdjoinRoot bridge, PR-2=PivotalCategory+RibbonCategory, PR-3=QuasitriangularBialgebra+RibbonHopfAlgebra, PR-4+=MTC instances (SU(2)_k, Ising, Fibonacci), F1=Software-only release (JOSS, this paper), F2=JOSS update (retrofit upstream PRs)) plus the italic note 'Fallback if Mathlib AI-content acceptance > 6 mo'. All node labels are bold white inside text-fitted rectangles and fully legible at native rendering width (1200 px × scale 2).

physics.notes: Structural flow correct and identical to round-2 (which was passing on physics, only failing on rendering). Three R-gates → four atomic PR chain → fallback diamond logic preserved. The §7.4 prose anchor 'Fallback engages if Mathlib AI-content acceptance is delayed > 6 months' is reproduced in the side-table legend's italic footer line.

style.notes: Colorblind-safe palette: steel-blue for R-gates (relationship-building), amber for atomic Mathlib PRs, cool-grey for software-only fallback. CMU Serif / Times font family consistent with project conventions. Bold white in-node labels readable against all three fill colors.

figures.caption_match_notes: Caption (paper line 692-702) describes the R1/R2/R3 → atomic-PR chain + software-only fallback structure; figure now displays this content legibly.
figures.notes: Round-3 verdict: upgraded from round-2 FAIL to PASS. Re-author solution adopted: option (c) abbreviated in-node labels + legend table — exactly the round-2 remediation suggestion. Side-effect fix: a plotly.js render bug (HTML entity `→` in title triggering kaleido Error 525) was discovered and corrected in `src/core/visualizations.py::fig_i2_mathlib_upstream_flow` by substituting the Unicode arrow `→`. Without this fix the saved PNG would have remained the round-2 stale image regardless of source-code correctness.

summary: Round-3 review of 5 I2 figures. All five figures PASS. The round-2 blocker (I2-FIGREV2-BLOCK-1: i2_fig5 mathlib upstream flow node-label clipping) is RESOLVED via re-author with abbreviated in-node labels (R1/R2/R3, PR-1..PR-4+, F1/F2) plus a side-table legend mapping abbreviations to full descriptions; an incidental plotly.js render bug (Error 525 from the `→` HTML entity in the figure title) was caught during round-3 PNG verification and fixed by substituting Unicode `→`. The round-2 advisory I2-FIGREV2-ADV-1 (i2_fig4 caption ↔ figure mismatch) is RESOLVED via caption edit deferring per-theorem test-name annotations to §2 prose. The remaining four advisories (ADV-2 fig3 blank space, ADV-3 fig3 column header copy-edit, ADV-4 fig2 sankey legibility, ADV-5 fig1 SphericalCategory node) are cosmetic and deferred to pre-press finalization. Bundle stage9_status upgrades from 'yellow' to 'green'.

advisories.description: Plotly Table figure has substantial blank space below the table (~70% of canvas). Cosmetic only — wastes column inches in JOSS layout. Defer to pre-press; reduce Plotly figure 'height' parameter or set explicit margins.
advisories.remediation: One-line edit to fig_i2_mtc_instances() to crop height; or post-export crop tool.

advisories.description: Header column reads 'Verlinde verified' but caption phrasing is 'Verlinde-formula' (paper line 518). Minor copy-edit consistency. Defer to pre-press; one-token edit in either the figure regen or the caption.

Sankey labels legible at 0.95\linewidth single-column; borderline in two-column. JOSS is single-column so this is fine for the primary submission target; CPC two-column variant would need font-size bump or split.
advisories.remediation: Verify target journal column layout; adjust Plotly font_size if two-column.

advisories.description: Round-1 I2-FIG-1 recommendation listed SphericalCategory as a library-original tier; current figure omits it as a separate node. §3 prose treats it as part of Pivotal/Ribbon chain. Optional strengthening only.
advisories.remediation: Either add SphericalCategory node to fig 1 or update §3 prose to explicitly note the omission.
